{
  "name": "Summer Sale 15% OFF", // (Required) Campaign name string (max 255 chars)
  "type": "percentage", // (Required) Options: percentage | fixed
  "value": 15.0, // (Required) Discount value decimal > 0 (e.g. 15.0 for 15% or 5)
  "starts_at": "2026-06-01 00:00:00", // (Optional) Start timestamp string YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
  "ends_at": "2026-08-31 23:59:59", // (Optional) End timestamp string YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
  "is_active": true // (Optional) Boolean: true | false (Default: true)
}

{
  "name": "Updated Summer Sale 20% OFF", // (Optional) Campaign name string (max 255 chars)
  "type": "percentage", // (Optional) Options: percentage | fixed
  "value": 20.0, // (Optional) Discount value decimal > 0
  "starts_at": "2026-06-01 00:00:00", // (Optional) Start timestamp string YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
  "ends_at": "2026-08-31 23:59:59", // (Optional) End timestamp string YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
  "is_active": true // (Optional) Boolean: true | false
}

{
  "name": "Khmer new year",
  "type": 0, // 0=percent, 1=fixed
  "value": 10,
  "starts_at": "26-04-14", // yy-mm-dd
  "ends_at" : "26-04-17", // yy-mm-dd
  "is_active" : 1
}

request.description:
### List Brands

Retrieve a list of all unique, active product brand names across the system (`/brands` or `/products/brands`).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Wireless Gaming Mouse", // (Required) Product title string (max 255 chars)
  "category_id": 1, // (Required) Existing category ID integer
  "description": "High precision 16000 DPI wireless gaming mouse", // (Optional) HTML/text description
  "unit_price": 25.0, // (Required) Cost price decimal >= 0
  "sell_price": 45.0, // (Required) Selling price decimal >= unit_price
  "stock": 100, // (Required) Initial stock quantity integer >= 0
  "stock_warning": 10, // (Optional) Low stock notification threshold integer
  "collection": "featured", // (Optional) Options: featured | trending | new_arrival
  "brand": "Logitech", // (Optional) Brand name string
  "sku": "LOGI-MOUSE-001", // (Required) Unique product SKU string
  "weight": 0.15, // (Optional) Weight in kg decimal
  "discount_id": 0, // (Optional) Active discount ID (0 or null if none)
  "status": 1, // (Required) Options: 1=active | 2=inactive
  "is_free_shipping": true, // (Optional) Boolean: true | false
  "thumbnail": "https://example.com/mouse.jpg", // (Optional) Main thumbnail image URL string or upload
  "images": [ // (Optional) Array of gallery image objects
    {"image_url": "https://example.com/mouse1.jpg", "alt_text": "Mouse Top View", "sort_order": 1}
  ],
  "variants": [ // (Optional) Array of product variant objects
    {
      "sku": "LOGI-MOUSE-BLK", // (Required) Variant SKU string
      "price": 45.0, // (Required) Variant selling price decimal
      "stock": 50, // (Required) Variant stock quantity integer
      "status": 1, // (Required) Options: 1=active | 2=inactive
      "attributes": [ // (Required if variant) Array of attribute key-values
        {"name": "Color", "value": "Black"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}

body.raw:
{
  "user_id": 1, // (Optional) Existing customer user ID integer (null if guest)
  "customer_name": "Customer Name", // (Optional) Full name string (Default: Guest)
  "customer_email": "customer@example.com", // (Optional) Customer email string
  "customer_phone": "+85512345678", // (Optional) Customer phone string
  "payment_method": "khqr", // (Optional) Options: khqr | cod | cash
  "payment_status": "paid", // (Required) Options: pending | paid | expired | failed
  "order_type": "manual", // (Required) Options: web | manual | pos
  "discount_type": "percentage", // (Optional) Options: percentage | fixed
  "discount_value": 10.0, // (Optional) Discount amount numeric >= 0
  "delivery_fee": 1.50, // (Optional) Delivery fee numeric >= 0 (Default: 0.00)
  "shipping_country": "Cambodia", // (Optional) Country string e.g. Cambodia
  "shipping_province": "Phnom Penh", // (Optional) Province string e.g. Phnom Penh
  "shipping_street": "Street 123", // (Optional) Street address string e.g. Street 123
  "shipping_latitude": 11.5564, // (Optional) Decimal coordinate (-90 to 90)
  "shipping_longitude": 104.9282, // (Optional) Decimal coordinate (-180 to 180)
  "notes": "Handle with care", // (Optional) Order remarks string (max 1000 chars)
  "items": [ // (Required) Array of order item objects
    {
      "product_id": 1, // (Required) Existing product ID integer
      "product_variant_id": null, // (Optional) Existing variant ID integer (null if none)
      "quantity": 2 // (Required) Quantity integer >= 1
    }
  ]
}

body.raw:
{
  "payment_method": "khqr", // (Required) Options: khqr | cod
  "customer_name": "Hou Menghor", // (Optional) Full name string (max 255 chars)
  "customer_email": "menghor@example.com", // (Optional) Valid email address (max 255 chars)
  "customer_phone": "+85512345678", // (Optional) Phone number string e.g. +85512345678
  "delivery_method": "j_and_t", // (Required if not POS) Options: j_and_t | vireak_buntham | cash_on_delivery
  "currency": "USD", // (Required) Options: USD | KHR
  "country": "Cambodia", // (Optional) Country string e.g. Cambodia (max 100 chars)
  "province": "Phnom Penh", // (Optional) Province string e.g. Phnom Penh (max 100 chars)
  "street": "Street 123, Boeung Keng Kang", // (Optional) Street address string (max 255 chars)
  "latitude": 11.5564, // (Optional) Decimal coordinate (-90 to 90 e.g. 11.5564)
  "longitude": 104.9282, // (Optional) Decimal coordinate (-180 to 180 e.g. 104.9282)
  "discount_type": "percentage", // (Optional) Options: percentage | fixed
  "discount_value": 10.0, // (Optional) Numeric discount value >= 0
  "order_type": "web" // (Optional) Options: web | manual | pos (Default: web)
}

header.description: (Required) Secret key verifying request originated from trusted .NET Gateway

request.description:
### Payment Webhook Callback (.NET Gateway)

Endpoint invoked asynchronously by the **.NET Payway Gateway Service** (`bakong-payway-service`) when ABA / Payway confirms a payment status.

#### Authentication
Secured via `X-Internal-Secret` header to prevent forged payment confirmations.
